success.title: An aika buƙatar tambayi farashin da nasara!
success.description: Ƙungiyar injiniyar mu za ta duba buƙatun ku kuma ta amsa cikin sa'o'i 24-48.

placeholders.detailedRequirements:
Da fatan za a ba da cikakkun bayanai da suka haɗa da:
- Buƙatun fasaha da ka'idoji
- Bayanin kayan aiki da adadi
- Buƙatun aiki
- Yanayin muhalli
- Buƙatun bin ka'ida
- Duk wani al'amari na musamman...
placeholders.additionalRequirements: Duk wani ƙarin buƙatu, yanayi na musamman ko tambayoyi...

labels.preferredBrands: Alamomin Kasuwanci/Ka'idoji da Aka Fi So
